title: Cheerble Smart Interactive Dog Toys - Wicked Ball AIR, Automatic Moving Bouncing & Rotating Dog Ball with E-TPU Material, IPX7, USB-C Rechargeable, Active Rolling Balls for Medium-Large Dogs - Blue
features: 【Upgraded Wicked Ball AIR】 Cheerble’s best-selling interactive dog ball toy now features an ultralight, 100% pet-safe E-TPU shell, tough enough to outlast even the most enthusiastic chewers. When playtime gets messy? Simply rinse the mud off or snap on a fresh shell – your dog's boredom buster that's built to stay fun for years, not weeks!

【3 Interactive Modes】 This self-moving dog toy ball keeps tails wagging with 3 play modes (Normal, Passive, Gentle). Watch the bouncing dog ball spark your puppy’s natural instincts through unpredictable bounces and rolls, keeps dogs mentally stimulated and reduces destructive chewing, giving them the perfect mix of brain games and physical exercise

【Pet-safe, Chew-Proof & Replaceable Shell】 The Wicked Ball Air's replaceable outer shell is made of E-TPU, which is super safe and environmentally friendly. Incidentally, the cores of the "Wicked Rugby" (ASIN: B0FFFZ2JZ9) and "Wicked Ball Air" are compatible. This means that if you purchase either Wicked ball model, you only need to swap the shell to enjoy the fun dog toys of both.

【Ideal for Medium-Large Breeds】 Interactive toys for dogs perfect for weighing 35 lbs / 16kg+ or more. Our 3.2-inch (8cm) dog ball fits perfectly in most retrievers' mouths. The textured surface helps clean teeth during play. We recommend supervising your pup at first to teach proper chasing (it's great bonding time!)

【Easy to Clean & USB-C Rechargeable】 Cleaning the Wicked Ball is a breeze. Simply wipe off any dirt and rinse the outer shell after making sure it's screwed on tightly. Wicked Ball Air provides 1 to 3.5 hours of playtime on a single charge. Recharging is easy with the included Type-C cable, taking just 50 minutes for a full charge

Please Note: This dog ball is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to "aggressive chewers damage", please supervise your pet with this toy. If you receive a defective Wicked Rugby ball or charging cable, please feel free to contact us.
